positive: A minimalist, stylized illustration featuring a detailed cosmic woodland scene. The composition is centered and highly symmetrical, showing bioluminescent flora, delicate root structures, and floating geometric cosmic bodies forming a forest canopy. Use strong contrasting colors: deep indigo and black backgrounds contrasting sharply with neon turquoise, ethereal lavender, and gold-leaf accents. The art style should be vector-graphic inspired, clean line art combined with vibrant, flat color washes, reminiscent of stained glass and Japanese woodblock prints. The overall mood is magical, tranquil, and celestial. Perfect for placement on a t-shirt or poster, with crisp lines and distinct silhouettes.
negative: blurry, low resolution, artifacts, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, poor quality, disfigured, noise, amateur, grain, gradient, photorealism
